cfg_statements.code: for d, t in enumerate(T): t -= 1; d += 1 satisfied += Ss[d-1][t] last[t] = d for i, c in enumerate(C): satisfied -= c*(d-last[i])
for i, c in enumerate(C): satisfied -= c*(d-last[i])
for d, t in enumerate(T): t -= 1; d += 1 satisfied += Ss[d-1][t] used[t].append(d) last[t] = d for i, c in enumerate(C): satisfied -= c*(d-last[i])
for i, c in enumerate(C): satisfied -= c*(d-last[i])

for d in range(Days): satisfied_max = -INF selected = -1 for t in range(26): score_t = Ss[d][t] for j, c in enumerate(C): if t != j: score_t -= c*(d+1-last[j]) if score_t > satisfied_max: satisfied_max = score_t selected = t T.append(selected+1) last[selected] = d+1
for t in range(26): score_t = Ss[d][t] for j, c in enumerate(C): if t != j: score_t -= c*(d+1-last[j]) if score_t > satisfied_max: satisfied_max = score_t selected = t
for j, c in enumerate(C): if t != j: score_t -= c*(d+1-last[j])
if score_t > satisfied_max: satisfied_max = score_t selected = t
befday2 = Days+1 if befind == len(Used[bef])-1 else Used[bef][befind+1]

if len(Used[aft]) > 0: aftday0 = 0 aftday2 = Days+1 for a in Used[aft]: if a < d: aftday0 = a elif aftday2 == Days+1: aftday2 = a aftd01 = d - aftday0 aftd12 = aftday2 - d aftd02 = aftd01 + aftd12 deltaSatis += C[aft]*(aftd02*(aftd02-1)//2) - C[aft]*(aftd01*(aftd01-1)//2 + aftd12*(aftd12-1)//2) else: d01 = d d12 = Days+1 - d deltaSatis += C[aft] * Days*(Days+1)//2 - C[aft]*(d01*(d01-1)//2 + d12*(d12-1)//2)
for a in Used[aft]: if a < d: aftday0 = a elif aftday2 == Days+1: aftday2 = a
if a < d: aftday0 = a elif aftday2 == Days+1: aftday2 = a
for a in Used[aft]: if a > d and not inserted: inserted = True new.append(d) new.append(a)
if a > d and not inserted: inserted = True new.append(d)
if bef == aft: return T, Used
if modifiedScore(d, aft, Used, T) > 0: T, Used = update(Used, T, bef, aft, d)
T, Used = update(Used, T, bef, aft, d)
while time.time() - START < TIMELIMIT: T, Used = goingup(T, Used)
for d, aft in Query: aft -= 1 bef = T[d-1]-1 Satisfied += modifiedScore(d, aft, Used, T) T, Used = update(Used, T, T[d-1]-1, aft, d) print(Satisfied)
T, Used = update(Used, T, T[d-1]-1, aft, d)
